title: UW–Madison names Remzi Arpaci-Dusseau founding dean of College of Computing and Artificial Intelligence, announces major investment in college’s launch
summary_en: $100 million in philanthropic support and a significant campus investment, including 50 new faculty positions, will support research, education, and innovation
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校任命计算与人工智能学院创始院长并宣布学院启动重大投入举措
